artPrompt: An enchanted hearing chamber where a single coin hovers mid-spin above a polished government bench, doubled into two glowing ghost-coins by an arcane cyan shimmer, while a faceless official's hand reaches up to pluck the chosen one. Rubber stamps and blank ledgers ring the scene in playful tilted shapes. The composition climbs the wide frame from desk to floating coins. Wide 4:3 landscape, oppressive ivory stillness, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Coin-Flip Recertification Hearing
text:
Whenever a player flips a coin, that coin must be recertified: that player flips it again. You choose which of the two flips is the official one.
Whenever you choose the official flip this way, you may make a 1/1 white Clerk creature token. (Someone has to stamp it.)
flavorText: Win or lose the flip, the hearing always finds in Prim's favor.

extras.parasitic: controls all coin flips at the table
